Examples

Example 1 View on Page
There is no content between this heading and the next
Mode: light
<h2 id="apps-you-can-use">Apps you can use</h2>
XPath: /h2[@id="apps-you-can-use"]
Example 2 View on Page
There is no content between this heading and the next
Mode: light
<h3 class="va-nav-linkslist-title vads-u-font-size--h4" id="-1">...</h3>
XPath: /h3[@id="-1"]
Example 3 View on Page
There is no content between this heading and the next
Mode: light
<h3 class="va-nav-linkslist-title vads-u-font-size--h4" id="-1">...</h3>

Example 4 View on Page
There is no content between this heading and the next
Mode: light
<h3 class="va-nav-linkslist-title vads-u-font-size--h4" id="-1">...</h3>
XPath: /h3[@id="-1"]
Example 5 View on Page
There is no content between this heading and the next
Mode: light
<h3 class="va-nav-linkslist-title vads-u-font-size--h4" id="-1">...</h3>
XPath: /h3[@id="-1"]

4 Moderate alfa Best Practice SIA-R53: Headings follow a logical hierarchy #
4 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: alfa

Roles: Content Author, UX Designer

Blocking: No

WCAG: Best Practice

Affected Pages

  • https://va.gov/augusta-health-care/programs/first-responder-deflection-support-services/ (1 occurrences)
  • https://va.gov/birmingham-health-care/research/birmingham-research-bulletin-eso-service-catalog-for-isso-support/ (1 occurrences)
  • https://va.gov/columbia-south-carolina-health-care/health-services/caregiver-support/ (1 occurrences)
  • https://va.gov/erie-health-care/health-services/caregiver-support/ (1 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The heading skips one or more levels
Mode: light
<h6>...</h6>
XPath: /h6
Example 2 View on Page
The heading skips one or more levels
Mode: light
<h3 id="new-process">New Process</h3>
XPath: /h3[@id="new-process"]
Example 3 View on Page
The heading skips one or more levels
Mode: light
<h3 id="connect-with-a-support-coordin">Connect with a support coordinator</h3>
XPath: /h3[@id="connect-with-a-support-coordin"]
Example 4 View on Page
The heading skips one or more levels
Mode: light
<h4>The Program of General Caregiver Support Services ...</h4>
XPath: /h4
1 Moderate alfa SIA-R113: #

Rule Information

Engine: alfa

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://va.gov/fayetteville-coastal-health-care/stories/celebrating-national-nutrition-month-the-vital-role-of-registered-dietitians-in-supporting-our-veterans/ (1 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Target has insufficient size and spacing
Mode: light
<a class="usa-breadcrumb__link" href="/fayetteville-coastal-health-care/stories" lang="en-US" hreflang="en-US">...</a>
XPath: /a[@class="usa-breadcrumb__link"]

🔧 Most Common Issues (axe)

2 rules
4 Moderate axe heading-order: #
4 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: axe

Roles: Content Author, UX Designer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://va.gov/augusta-health-care/programs/first-responder-deflection-support-services/ (1 occurrences)
  • https://va.gov/birmingham-health-care/research/birmingham-research-bulletin-eso-service-catalog-for-isso-support/ (1 occurrences)
  • https://va.gov/columbia-south-carolina-health-care/health-services/caregiver-support/ (1 occurrences)
  • https://va.gov/erie-health-care/health-services/caregiver-support/ (1 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h6><strong>Emergency Services at VA Augusta’s Medical Center&nbsp;</strong></h6>
XPath: h6:nth-child(1)
Example 2 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h3 id="new-process">New Process</h3>
XPath: #new-process
Example 3 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h3 id="connect-with-a-support-coordin">Connect with a support coordinator</h3>
XPath: #connect-with-a-support-coordin
Example 4 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h4>The Program of General Caregiver Support Services (PGCSS)</h4>
XPath: h4:nth-child(4)
2 Moderate axe aria-dialog-name: #
2 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: axe

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://va.gov/accessibility-at-va-esp/ (1 occurrences)
  • https://va.gov/accessibility-at-va/ (1 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
ARIA dialog and alertdialog nodes should have an accessible name
Mode: light
<div aria-modal="true" role="dialog" aria-labelledby="sidebar_header">
XPath: div[aria-modal="true"]
Example 2 View on Page
ARIA dialog and alertdialog nodes should have an accessible name
Mode: light
<div aria-modal="true" role="dialog" aria-labelledby="sidebar_header">
XPath: div[aria-modal="true"]

Example 5 View on Page

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://va.gov/accessibility-at-va-esp/ (1 occurrences)
  • https://va.gov/accessibility-at-va/ (1 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The 'id' "sidebar_header" specified for the ARIA property 'aria-labelledby' value is not valid
Mode: light
<div aria-labelledby="sidebar_header" role="dialog" aria-modal="true">
Example 2 View on Page
The 'id' "sidebar_header" specified for the ARIA property 'aria-labelledby' value is not valid
Mode: light
<div aria-labelledby="sidebar_header" role="dialog" aria-modal="true">

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Verify the contrast ratio of the text against the lightest and the darkest colors of the background meets the WCAG AA minimum requirements for text of size 15px and weight of 400
Mode: light
<span class="">
Example 2 View on Page
Verify the contrast ratio of the text against the lightest and the darkest colors of the background meets the WCAG AA minimum requirements for text of size 15px and weight of 400

<span class="">

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Heading level 3 skipped from level 1. Use h2 instead.
